title: WeatherAPI Runtime Secret Questions
note: gtc setup --ui should ask for the runtime secret keys required by weatherapi-pack.

questions.label: WeatherAPI API key (Current Weather)
questions.description: API key used by get_weather. You may reuse this same key for forecast.

questions.label: WeatherAPI API key (Forecast Weather)
questions.description: API key used by get_forecast_weather. You may reuse the same key from current weather.
